summary: Parallel review: FAIL (10 critical, 14 warning, 5 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: 🔴 `package.json:8` — `test/parsers.test.mjs` is not in the `"test"` script; the gate never runs these tests
🔴 `tasks/task-1/artifacts/test-output.txt` — Artifact references `parseJunitXml`/`getParser` from an intermediate refactor; does not reflect committed `parseJUnit` code
🟡 `bin/lib/parsers.mjs:43` — CDATA body without `message` attr leaks `<![CDATA[` into message text
🟡 `bin/lib/parsers.mjs:87` — `extractLine` falsely matches port numbers (`v2.0:8080` → line 8080)
🟡 `bin/lib/parsers.mjs:73` — `extractAttr` regex breaks on mixed quotes (`name="it's"`)
🟡 `bin/lib/parsers.mjs:33` — `<error>` elements silently ignored (JUnit uses these for unexpected exceptions)

🔴 bin/lib/parsers.mjs:1 — Module has zero callers in production code; `gate.mjs` unchanged; feature delivers no user-facing value until integration is wired; flagged in every prior review round and never addressed

🔴 tasks/task-1/eval.md:10 — Prior eval references `bin/lib/validator-parsers.mjs` which does not exist on the branch; reviews validated phantom code that was subsequently replaced by `bin/lib/parsers.mjs` with a different API
🔴 bin/lib/parsers.mjs:1 — `parseTap` and `parseGithubActions` do not exist in committed code; task-2 and task-3 acceptance criteria are completely unimplemented

🔴 SPEC.md:85 — Done-when item "bin/lib/validator-parsers.mjs exists with parseJunit, parseTap, parseGhaMatcher, parseGenericJson, and detectAndParse exports" is unmet; committed file is `parsers.mjs` with only `parseJUnit`
🔴 bin/lib/gate.mjs:1 — Zero changes to gate.mjs; no parser dispatch, no `--output-format` flag, no `validator-findings.json` writing; verdict pipeline ignores parsed output entirely
🟡 bin/lib/parsers.mjs:57 — Finding format `classname.testname:line — message` differs from spec AC #1 `file:line — classname: message`; re-scoping not documented
🟡 SPEC.md:30 — Spec says file should be `bin/lib/validator-parsers.mjs`; actual file is `bin/lib/parsers.mjs`
🟡 STATE.json:4 — Feature status "completed" but all 17 tasks are blocked; reconciliation artifact misrepresents outcome
🔴 `package.json:22` — `test/parsers.test.mjs` is not in the `npm test` script; all 16 parser tests are invisible to the quality gate. One-line fix needed.
🟡 `bin/lib/parsers.mjs:33` — `<error>` elements (runtime exceptions) are silently ignored; Maven/Gradle JUnit XML commonly uses these for real test failures.
🟡 `bin/lib/parsers.mjs:43` — CDATA sections in failure body pass through raw (verified: produces `<![CDATA[Error at File.js:10]]>` in message text instead of clean text).
🟡 `test/.test-workspace/` — Two STATE.json files have non-deterministic timestamp diffs committed (noise).
🟡 bin/lib/parsers.mjs:57 — Finding text includes unsanitized `classname`/`testname`/`message` from XML; add `.replace(/[\x00-\x1f\x7f]/g, '')` to strip control characters before terminal display
🟡 bin/lib/parsers.mjs:1 — Module has zero production callers (confirmed by grep); end-to-end security of parsed findings → verdict pipeline cannot be verified until gate.mjs integration lands

🔴 `bin/lib/parsers.mjs:18` — `parseJUnit` is exported but has zero production consumers; no file in `bin/` imports this module; dead code from the production system's perspective; wire it into `gate.mjs` or defer the file until integration is ready

🔴 `test/parsers.test.mjs:1` — Test file (222 lines, 16 tests) is NOT listed in `package.json:22`'s explicit test file list; `npm test` never executes these tests; add `test/parsers.test.mjs` to the `"test"` script
🟡 `test/.test-workspace/features/backlog-gate-test/STATE.json:13` — Timestamp-only diff from test re-runs; noise without functional change
🟡 `test/.test-workspace/features/next-feature/STATE.json:9` — Same timestamp churn
